tags.name: `mc-error`
tags.description:
Purpose: Component for displaying error messages in forms and other user inputs.
Category: Forms
When to use: When you need to display error messages related to form validation or user input.
When not to use: When you need to display non-error messages or information.
Works with components: mc-checkbox-group, mc-date-picker, mc-file-upload, mc-input-date, mc-input-time, mc-input, mc-multi-select, mc-number-stepper, mc-radio-group, mc-select-native, mc-select, mc-switch-group, mc-textarea, mc-typeahead-multi-select, mc-typeahead
Alternative component names: Error Message, Form Error

Slots:

  * ` ` {} - The default slot for the error message. Used to display custom text/icon

Attributes:

  * `errormessage` {`string | undefined`} - Error text to be shown.

  * `invalid` {`boolean | undefined`} - Error text to be shown.

  * `fit` {`Fit | undefined`} - Fit of the hint.

  * `visible` {`boolean`} - True, either The error slot is not empty, or the error prop has a value.

Properties:

  * `hasSlotError` {`boolean`} - 

  * `errorNodes` {`HTMLElement[]`} - 

  * `errormessage` {`string | undefined`} - Error text to be shown.

  * `invalid` {`boolean | undefined`} - Error text to be shown.

  * `fit` {`Fit | undefined`} - Fit of the hint.

  * `visible` {`boolean`} - True, either The error slot is not empty, or the error prop has a value.

attributes.name: errormessage
attributes.description:
`errormessage` {`string | undefined`} - Error text to be shown.

Property: errormessage

attributes.name: invalid
attributes.description:
`invalid` {`boolean | undefined`} - Error text to be shown.

Property: invalid

Default: false

attributes.name: fit
attributes.description:
`fit` {`Fit | undefined`} - Fit of the hint.

Property: fit

Default: medium

attributes.name: visible
attributes.description:
`visible` {`boolean`} - True, either The error slot is not empty, or the error prop has a value.

Property: visible

Default: false
